Update:

TONY STARK WAS ABLE TO BUILD THIS IN A CAVE! WITH A BOX OF SCRAPS!

I made stable purely random randomising system. Now you shouldn't constantly be getting only Ju Fufu and Alice
On top of that, I added seed-based memory system, so AI actually remembers which roles it assigned
(You can also manupulate seed to your liking, kinda like sandbox, but you gotta know codes so go out and experiment)

≪━─━─━─━─◈─━─━─━─━≫

Scenario:

.

1 - AnyPov. Some evil ass guys added strong aphrodisiac into New Eridu's

.

How to use/How it should work (not always does tho):

.

There are two types of guests: Normal ones and lewd ones

Each day is divided into day part and night part.

During day, you should expect two newcomers, also you can interact with those in house

IF AI DOESN'T INTRODUCE YOU TO NEW CHARACTERS AND YOU KNOW IT WAS ONLY ONE NEWCOMER TODAY, TELL AI TO MAKE SOMEONE APPEAR AT THE DOOR

When you want to finish day phase, just state that your character is going to sleep. It will switch into night part

During night part, those lewd ones you let in will come to your bedroom, and it's up to you what to do next.

It supposed to work like that. If it doesn't, please report to me.

If you don't like answer just generate another one

SHOULD I EVEN SAY THAT PROXY IS HEAVILY RECOMMENDED?
